subcodes.first_line: There hath descended upon the Tree, and upon its branches and leaves, that whereby the Cause of God hath been exalted, yet the people remain veiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ورد علی الشجر و افنانه و اوراقه ما ارتفع به امر الله ولکن الناس فی حجاب و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
